title: Lead SEO Specialist at BikeDekho Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at BikeDekho Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
BikeDekho Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BikeDekho Advisory Limited:
BikeDekho Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho Advisory Limited!
